name: PA fee caps
description: 10% during declared emergencies (1 year after declaration), 20% standard claims — FL Statute 626.854(11)

name: Solicitation rules
description: FL Statute 626.854: solicitation restricted Mon-Sat 8am-8pm, 48hr waiting period after disaster event

name: SB 2-A (Dec 2022)
description: Eliminated one-way attorney fees, banned AOB, shortened claim deadlines: 1 year new/reopened, 18 months supplemental

name: HB 837 (Mar 2023)
description: Modified comparative negligence (50%+ bars recovery), cut negligence SOL from 4 to 2 years

name: Referral prohibition
description: PA referral compensation to non-PAs strictly prohibited under 626.854(12-13) — $10K-$20K fines per violation

name: Homeowner Claims Bill of Rights
description: FL 627.7142: right to hire PA, right to demand appraisal, right to free DFS mediation, interest on late payments

name: OPPAGA study
description: PA-represented Citizens Insurance hurricane claims: 574% higher (non-cat), 747% higher (2005 storms) — Report 10-06

name: CRA license
description: License W549958 — Eddy D Gomez, 3-20 Public Adjuster License, State of Florida
